popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  Count of Landgraf in Alsace; Seigneur of Montbeliard, 1083; Count of Bar-le-Duc.  Founded the priory of Inamingers in Lorraine.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/BAR.htm#ThierryIdied1105B …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar於1045年出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，他的父親Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson30歲，母親Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia28歲。他於大約1076年與Ermentrude de Bourgogne在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1105年1月2日在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易奧圖。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar于1045年出生在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克时，他的父亲Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson30岁，母亲Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia28岁。他于大约1076年与Ermentrude de Bourgogne在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1105年1月2日在他的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易奧圖。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thierry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Germanic Theodoric, composed of elements meaning ‘people’ and ‘rule’. Compare Terry .

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar was born in 1045, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson, was 30 and his mother, Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia, was 28. He married Ermentrude de Bourgogne about 1076, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 2 January 1105, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Autun, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar est né en 1045, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Ermentrude de Bourgogne environ 1076, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 janvier 1105, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Autun, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar 1045 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson 30 und seine Mutter Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia 28. Er hat um 1076 in Normandie, Frankreich Ermentrude de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Januar 1105 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Autun, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar è nato il nel 1045 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Ermentrude de Bourgogne circa 1076, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 gennaio 1105, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Autun, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Barが1045年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Louis de Montbéliard-Moussonは30歳，母Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingiaは28歳であった。約1076年にフランスノーマンディでErmentrude de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1105年1月2日に故郷で60歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーアウトゥンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar(이)가 1045년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1076년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Ermentrude de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1105년 1월 2일 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 오툰에 묻혔다.

pt.between 29 August 1071 and 29 August 107: de 29 de agosto de 1071 a 29 de agosto de 1076
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar nasceu em 1045, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermentrude de Bourgogne aproximadamente 1076, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1105, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Autun, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar родился в 1045 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermentrude de Bourgogne около 1076 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 2 января 1105 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности аучунь, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar nació en 1045, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Ermentrude de Bourgogne aproximadamente 1076, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de enero de 1105, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Autun, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
